channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: DeSantis unveils voting map that could boost Trump's GOP redistricting
item.description: Florida governor calls special session for redistricting that may flip House seats.

item.title: Melania Trump urges ABC to act against Jimmy Kimmel over 'hateful' joke
item.description: Kimmel gave a mock speech two days before the WHCD shooting; Melania responds.

item.title: China blocks Meta from acquiring AI startup Manus
item.description: Meta claims compliance with law, expects resolution to China's block.

item.title: Inside security at the White House Correspondents' Dinner
item.description: Shooting at WHCD raises security questions about gunman's proximity to president.
